underlying_goal: Fix a test suite failure where a graceful shutdown timeout was causing process.exit to be called during test runs, killing Jest
friction_detail: First fix (mocking setupGracefulShutdown) didn't resolve the issue; the real root cause was a missing finally block around clearTimeout in the command's handleShutdown logic.
brief_summary: User reported tests crashing due to a graceful shutdown timeout calling process.exit; Claude diagnosed and fixed the root cause by moving clearTimeout into a finally block after an initial unsuccessful attempt.
